task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus main dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the agent successfully bypassed the login page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the administration or configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Admin', 'Configuration', or 'Settings' tab is actively selected in the ADAudit Plus navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the specific settings for process exclusions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration page or dialog box specifically for 'Process Audit Exclusion', 'Exclude Processes', or 'Process Tracking' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct target process name to be excluded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'titan_backup.exe' is typed into the process name input field within the exclusion configuration form.

task_completion.description: Verify the exclusion rule was successfully saved or applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The process 'titan_backup.exe' is visible in the list of active/saved process exclusions, or a success message (e.g., 'Saved successfully') is displayed after adding the process.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web interface rather than command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within the Microsoft Edge browser. No terminal windows (e.g., PowerShell, Command Prompt) are open or used to configure the exclusion via scripts or APIs.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual ADAudit Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL and interface clearly belong to the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web application, rather than a text editor, local HTML mockup, or notes app.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (such as pgAdmin, SQL Server Management Studio, or similar) are open or used to insert the exclusion record directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log in using the credentials user: 'admin' and password: 'Admin@2024'. The exact process name that must be configured for exclusion is 'titan_backup.exe'.
